scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n API,WEB -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @nexus/web && npm run build --workspace @nexus/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @nexus/web && npm run lint --workspace @nexus/api
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @nexus/web && npm run test --workspace @nexus/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @nexus/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @nexus/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @nexus/api
